summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kaelra's 4 new skill screens (Jobs, Class, Founder, Smart Home), Context Builder, Voice fallback, and Google OAuth graceful handling. Backend: 99/99 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 skill pages render and function correctly, Connected Accounts shows Google not configured with graceful error, Settings has context controls. Fixed critical bug: StatusPill missing import in Settings.js.

fixed_bugs.issue: StatusPill component not imported, causing ReferenceError and breaking Settings page

passed_tests: Backend: All 99 API tests passed (100% success rate)

Backend Skills - Jobs: GET /api/jobs (matches, pipeline, counts), GET /api/jobs/best-resume, POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/status (all statuses including 'applied' creating follow-up action), POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/recruiter-reply (creates sensitive approval action)

Backend Skills - Class: GET /api/class, POST /api/class/assignments, POST /api/class/assignments/{aid}/status, POST /api/class/assignments/{aid}/study-plan, POST /api/class/{class_id}/professor-reply (creates sensitive approval action)

Backend Skills - Founder: GET /api/founder (project, tasks, checklist, metrics with series), POST /api/founder/tasks, POST /api/founder/tasks/{tid}/status, POST /api/founder/checklist/{cid}/toggle, POST /api/founder/draft-post (sensitive action), POST /api/founder/summarize-metrics

Backend Skills - Smart Home: GET /api/home (devices, routines, simulated flag), PUT /api/home/devices/{device_id} (light/thermostat/alarm change immediately, lock requires approval and creates sensitive action), POST /api/home/morning-routine, POST /api/home/routines

Backend Context Builder: POST /api/context/build (returns indexed data, suggested memories, actions, sources, steps), GET /api/context/status, GET /api/context/suggested-memories, POST /api/context/suggested-memories/{id}/resolve, POST /api/context/pause, DELETE /api/context/indexed

Backend Voice fallback: GET /api/voice/status returns provider='browser' configured=false when no ElevenLabs key; POST /api/voice/tts returns {audio:null, provider:'browser'} gracefully (no 500 error)

Backend Google OAuth (not configured): GET /api/oauth/google/status returns configured=false connected=false; GET /api/oauth/google/url returns HTTP 400 with helpful detail; POST /api/oauth/google/disconnect returns ok
Backend Regression: All core endpoints working (auth, dashboard, briefing, chat/stream, actions, memories, goals, routines, files, accounts, devices, notifications, audit, privacy)
Frontend: All 4 skill pages render without errors (/jobs, /class, /founder, /home)
Frontend Jobs: Best-resume card shows, Matches/Pipeline tabs work, job status changes via select, 'Draft recruiter reply' button works
Frontend Class: Add assignment dialog works, assignment status changes, classes and assignments display
Frontend Founder: Traction recharts chart renders, tasks display, checklist items toggle, add task works
Frontend Smart Home: Light toggle works, thermostat +/- works, lock shows 'approval' badge and doesn't change state immediately, alarm toggle works, 'Run Good Morning' button works
Frontend Connected Accounts: Google Workspace card shows 'Not connected', 'Connect Google' button present, clicking Connect shows graceful error toast (not configured), no crash
Frontend Settings: 'Connected context' section shows, pause/resume indexing toggle works, suggested memories approve/reject buttons work (when present)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 critical bug found and fixed, all features working after fix)

graceful_fallbacks_verified: Voice: Returns browser provider when ElevenLabs not configured (no crash)
Google OAuth: Returns 400 with helpful message when not configured (no crash)
All skill endpoints serve realistic demo/mock data as expected
sensitive_actions_verified: Jobs: Recruiter reply creates approval-gated action
Class: Professor email creates approval-gated action
Founder: LinkedIn post draft creates approval-gated action
Smart Home: Lock/unlock creates approval-gated action (state doesn't change until approved)
additional_notes.mobile_note: Mobile navigation testing was limited due to Settings page error, but after fix, mobile tabbar should work correctly
